summary: P1 Mobile responsive fixes testing complete. All features working correctly at 375px viewport. Dashboard tabs scrollable with gradient fade, AppointmentWizard stepper fits at 375px, participant inputs h-11, nav buttons stacked full-width, ParticipantManagement buttons full-width, Settings pages p-4 padding. No horizontal overflow on any page. All wording unchanged. Desktop regression passed at 1280px.

dashboard_tabs: ✅ Tabs container has overflow-x-auto for horizontal scroll
✅ Gradient fade indicator present (bg-gradient-to-l from-white to-transparent)
appointment_wizard: ✅ All 5 stepper steps visible at 375px without horizontal overflow
✅ Participant input height: 44px (h-11 for touch targets)
participant_management: ✅ 'Ajouter un participant' button height: 44px (min touch target)
✅ 'Retour à l'engagement' button height: 44px (min touch target)
settings_pages: ✅ Payment: card display responsive, buttons stacked
wording_unchanged: ✅ 'Never Lose Your Time' visible on landing and all authenticated pages
desktop_regression_1280px: ✅ Desktop nav 'Tableau de bord' link visible
✅ 'Créer un engagement' button width: 232px (NOT full-width on desktop)

critical_code_review_comments: All P1 mobile responsive fixes implemented correctly
Dashboard tabs have gradient fade indicator for scroll hint
AppointmentWizard stepper compact and fits at 375px
All buttons have min-h-[44px] for touch targets on mobile
Settings pages use p-4 padding on mobile
No wording changes detected - all labels identical to desktop
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 mobile responsive fixes complete. All pages tested at 375x812 viewport. Dashboard tabs scrollable with gradient fade. AppointmentWizard stepper fits at 375px. All buttons have 44px min height for touch targets. Settings pages have p-4 padding on mobile. Desktop regression passed at 1280px - nav layout unchanged.
